Advancement.Title: Advancement — All Sixes!
Advancement.SpendHeadline: Spend {cost} XP on a new skill?
Advancement.SpendHint: Name your new skill (child of {skill}, level {level}):
Advancement.SpendCost: Costs {cost} XP — you can cancel if you change your mind.

Warn.CannotDeleteRoot: The root skill (Do Anything) cannot be deleted.
Warn.XpAlreadySpent: XP has already been spent on this roll.
Warn.NotEnoughXp: Need {cost} XP to advance but you only have {xp}.
Warn.NoActor: Could not find your character. Ask your GM.
Warn.NoSkill: Could not find the selected skill.

Chat.AdvancementWaiting: XP spent — waiting for GM to name the new skill…

Theme.Name: Theme
Theme.Hint: Visual theme for the Roll for Shoes system.

NpcMode.Name: NPC Default Mode
NpcMode.Hint: Whether NPCs use fixed difficulty or a full skill tree.

AdvancementNamer.Name: Skill Advancement: Who Names the New Skill?
AdvancementNamer.Hint: When a player rolls all sixes in a challenge, who is prompted to name the new skill? 'GM' is the default — the GM types the name and it appears on the actor. 'Player' prompts the player's own client.

SplashAudience.Name: Roll Splash Audience
SplashAudience.Hint: Who sees the full-screen result flourish when a skill is rolled.

DifficultyMode.Name: Difficulty Mode
DifficultyMode.Hint: Standard: canonical DCs are 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18 (default DC 3). More XP: canonical DCs are 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24 (default DC 4) — players fail more often and earn more XP.

TargetNamePicker.Name: DC Widget: Tier Name Picker
TargetNamePicker.Hint: How the GM selects a named difficulty tier on the target widget. Chips: pill buttons appear below the card on hover. Menu: click the 'Target' label to open a dropdown. Rail: tier names slide out to the right on hover. None: use +/− buttons only.

SyncTokenName.Name: Sync Token Name on Rename
SyncTokenName.Hint: When a character's name is changed, automatically update the prototype token and any tokens already placed in scenes.

SheetTextSize.Name: Character Sheet Text Size
SheetTextSize.Hint: Sets the base font size for character sheet body text. Each player can set their own preference.
